channel.title: Saju — Four Pillars of Destiny
channel.description: Free, instant, multi-lingual (20 langs) Korean Saju reading. Authentic methodology. Open source MIT. Daily build log.

item.title: Free 4-pillars reading in 20 languages
item.description: Birth date/time/gender → instant 4-pillars chart + 5-element balance + 10 gods + hidden stems + 12 life stages + void branches + 神煞 + current year pillar. Browser-rendered, no signup. EN/KO/JA/ZH/ES + 15 more.

item.title: Day Master 10 archetypes — comprehensive guide
item.description: 10 Heavenly Stems (甲乙丙丁戊己庚辛壬癸) explained as personality archetypes. Day Master is the lens through which 4-pillars analysis interprets everything else.

item.title: Compatibility (궁합) between two charts
item.description: Two-chart compatibility analysis with 0-100 score + 5-tier verdict + 1200x630 shareable card image.
